description: Create a new invoice in Vtiger CRM with the subject 'INV-2024-GREENFIELD' for the organization 'Greenfield Landscaping LLC' and contact 'Maria Gonzalez'. Set the invoice date to '2024-11-15', the due date to '2024-12-15', and the status to 'Created'. Include two line items: 'Commercial Lawn Mower' (Quantity: 2, List Price: $1250.00) and 'Irrigation Control System' (Quantity: 5, List Price: $340.00). Apply a 'Sales Tax' of 8.25% to the invoice.
